requirements.title: Recoverable embedding provider fallback
requirements.description: Embedding auto-fallback from local to remote MUST be recoverable — either retry local on a configurable timer or fall back per-request rather than permanently replacing the provider.

requirements.title: FTS5 degradation signal
requirements.description: FTS5 fallback to LIKE search SHOULD propagate a degradation signal so callers can log the fallback and optionally adjust scoring behavior.

requirements.title: Multi-interface port conflict probe
requirements.description: Gateway port-conflict probe MUST check all configured host interfaces, not just the first one, to correctly detect existing gateways.

requirements.title: Serialized fingerprint-based session lookup
requirements.description: Fingerprint-based session identification MUST serialize concurrent lookups to prevent session splits for the same conversation.

requirements.title: Protocol-agnostic LTM cache optimization
requirements.description: LTM injection SHOULD preserve the stable/context-bound distinction across all protocol paths to optimize cache behavior, not just for Anthropic.

requirements.title: Cross-protocol tool_result preservation
requirements.description: All protocol translators MUST preserve tool_result blocks when converting between gateway internal format and upstream wire format.

requirements.title: Cross-protocol streaming error propagation
requirements.description: All streaming translators MUST propagate upstream error events to clients in the target protocol's error format.

requirements.title: Shared gateway discovery module
requirements.description: Gateway discovery logic SHOULD be extracted to a shared module consumed by both OpenCode and Pi plugins to prevent code divergence.

requirements.title: Extensible upstream routing
requirements.description: The upstream routing table MUST be extensible via configuration to support new model providers without code changes.

requirements.title: Complete agent detection registry
requirements.description: The agent detection registry SHOULD include entries for all documented supported tools (including Cursor and Windsurf).

requirements.title: Consistent session state persistence lifecycle
requirements.description: Session state persistence MUST either restore all persisted fields on load OR remove write-only persistence for transient fields. saveForceMinLayer MUST NOT delete the entire session_state row.

requirements.title: LTM pool deduplication
requirements.description: The LTM scoring pipeline SHOULD deduplicate entries after merging project and cross-project pools to prevent duplicate injection into the system prompt.

requirements.title: CLI-core implementation delegation
requirements.description: CLI data commands SHOULD delegate to core functions rather than reimplementing logic (e.g., pairKey) to prevent divergence.

requirements.title: Recall gateway-CLI parity
requirements.description: CLI recall SHOULD document query expansion limitations and offer parity with gateway recall where possible.
